description: Discover the ultimate heavy-duty pickup that combines uncompromising capability with exceptional style and technology - the 2026 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD ZR2. This exceptional vehicle is a true masterpiece, engineered to conquer any terrain and elevate your driving experience to new heights.  Boasting a robust Duramax 6.6L V8 Turbodiesel engine, the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 delivers an impressive 470 horsepower and an astounding 975 lb-ft of torque, ensuring you have the power to tackle even the most demanding tasks with ease. Paired with a smooth-shifting 10-speed automatic transmission and a rugged 4WD system, this truck is built to handle any challenge you throw its way.   Multi-Flex Tailgate Audio System by Kicker  Dark Essentials Package  Gooseneck/5th Wheel Prep Package  Hitch Package  Preferred Equipment Group 3LT  Technology Package  Up-Level Rear Seat with Storage Package  ZR2 Suspension Package  SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription  Steering Wheel Audio Controls  Electric Rear-Window Defogger  120-Volt Bed Mounted Power Outlet  120-Volt Interior Power Outlet  But the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is more than just raw power. It's a masterpiece of design, with a bold and distinctive exterior that commands attention on the road. The Black Chevytec Spray-on Bedliner, Black Name Plates, and High Gloss Black Mirror Caps add a touch of rugged sophistication, while the LED Cargo Area Lighting and LED Smoked Amber Roof Marker Lamps ensure you can work and play even in low-light conditions.  Inside, the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 pampers you with a wealth of premium features, including a 15-inch Diagonal Multicolor Head-Up Display, Wireless Charging, Wireless Phone Projection, and a Rear Camera Mirror. The Heated 2nd Row Outboard Seats and Perforated Leather Seat Trim provide unparalleled comfort, while the Heated Steering Wheel and Ventilated Front Seats ensure you stay comfortable in any weather.  But the true standout feature of the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is its uncompromising capability. The Gooseneck/5th Wheel Prep Package and Hitch Package make it the perfect companion for your towing and hauling needs, while the ZR2 Suspension Package provides exceptional off-road performance, allowing you to conquer even the most challenging terrain.  Whether you're tackling a tough job site, exploring the great outdoors, or simply commuting in style, the 2026 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is the ultimate heavy-duty pickup that will exceed your every expectation. Experience the power, the style, and the capability that sets this truck apart from the rest. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate why the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is the perfect choice for your next adventure.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Dark Essentials Package,Gooseneck/5th Wheel Prep description: Thank you for choosing Classic Honda, this Red Diamond 2024 Mitsubishi Outlander Sport SE is a great choice! Check out the following:  No Accidents!      BLACK, COMBINATION SOFT-TOUCH SEAT TRIM    This Outlander Sport has the following features: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: Discover the perfect blend of style and performance with the 2026 Hyundai Sonata SEL Sport. This stunning mid-size sedan is a true standout, offering a captivating combination of advanced technology, exceptional efficiency, and refined design.  - HYUNDAI CERTIFIED PRE-OWNED - BLUETOOTH HANDS-FREE PHONE SYSTEM - BACK-UP CAMERA - BLIND-SPOT MONITORING - HEATED SEATS - ANDROID AUTO/APPLE CARPLAY - CARFAX ONE-OWNER - LANE DEPARTURE SYSTEM - PUSH BUTTON START  Step inside the Sonata SEL Sport and experience the epitome of modern comfort and convenience. The spacious cabin is adorned with premium cloth seating surfaces, providing exceptional support and style. Dual-zone automatic climate control ensures everyone on board enjoys their ideal temperature, while the heated front seats offer a cozy retreat on chilly days.  Unleash the power of the Sonata's efficient 4-cylinder engine, paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and front-wheel drive. With an impressive 25 MPG in the city and 36 MPG on the highway, this sedan delivers exceptional fuel economy, allowing you to go farther between fill-ups.  The Sonata's exterior is a masterpiece of sleek, contemporary design. The Serenity White paint gleams in the sunlight, complemented by the striking 18-inch aluminum alloy wheels. Thoughtful touches, such as the mud guards and cargo tray, enhance the Sonata's practicality and versatility.  Technology takes center stage in the Sonata, with features like the Bluetooth hands-free phone system, Android Auto/Apple CarPlay, and the rearview camera. Stay connected and in control, whether navigating city streets or cruising down the highway.  Safety is paramount in the Sonata, with a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Blind-spot monitoring, lane departure warning, and automatic high-beam headlights work tirelessly to keep you and your passengers secure on the road.  At Antwerpen Automotive, every pre-owned vehicle is hand-selected, fully inspected, and backed by our commitment to quality and transparency. With over 500 used cars in stock across all price ranges, you'll always find the right vehicle at the right value. Introducing the 2024 Mazda CX-90 AWD 3.3 Turbo Selecta masterpiece of engineering and style that embodies the pinnacle of modern automotive innovation. This stunning vehicle is designed for those who crave adventure, elegance, and power all wrapped into one exquisite package. With its striking white exterior, the CX-90 commands attention on the road, exuding a sense of sophistication and confidence that is simply unmatched.  Step inside, and you'll be enveloped in the luxurious embrace of a black leatherette interior, where comfort meets style. The meticulous craftsmanship is evident in every stitch, offering an atmosphere that is both inviting and refined. Whether you're navigating city streets or embarking on a cross-country journey, the CX-90's interior is your sanctuary, providing an unparalleled driving experience.  Under the hood lies the heart of this magnificent machinean e-SKYACTIV-G 3.3L Mild Hybrid Turbo I6 engine that delivers a robust 280 horsepower and an impressive 332 ft. lbs. of torque. This powerhouse of an engine ensures that every drive is an exhilarating experience, seamlessly blending performance with efficiency. The mild hybrid system enhances fuel economy without compromising on power, allowing you to enjoy the thrill of the drive while being mindful of the environment.  The 8-Speed Shiftable Automatic Transmission offers smooth and responsive gear changes, giving you complete control and confidence behind the wheel. Whether you're cruising down the highway or tackling winding mountain roads, the CX-90 adapts effortlessly to your driving style, ensuring a ride that is as dynamic as it is comfortable.  Mazda's commitment to innovation and safety is evident in every aspect of the CX-90. The all-wheel-drive system provides superior traction and stability, giving you peace of mind in all driving conditions. Whether it's rain, snow, or sunshine, the CX-90 is designed to keep you firmly in control, making every journey a safe and enjoyable one.  The exterior design of the CX-90 is a testament to Mazda's KodoSoul of Motiondesign philosophy. The sleek lines and bold contours create a sense of motion even when the vehicle is at a standstill. The striking white finish accentuates its dynamic profile, making it a true head-turner on any road.  Inside, the advanced technology features are designed to keep you connected and entertained. The intuitive infotainment system ensures that everything you need is at your fingertips, from navigation to music and beyond. The ergonomic layout of the controls ensures that you can focus on what matters mostthe joy of driving.  In the 2024 Mazda CX-90 AWD 3.3 Turbo Select, every detail has been meticulously crafted to provide an exceptional driving experience. It's more than just a vehicle; it's a statement of style, performance, and innovation. This is your invitation to experience the future of drivinga future where comfort, power, and elegance come together in perfect harmony.  Don't miss your chance to own this remarkable vehicle. The 2024 Mazda CX-90 is ready to take you on a journey like no other. Visit your nearest Mazda dealership today and discover the thrill of driving the CX-90 for yourself. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane. description: LUXURIOUS, ALL-ELECTRIC, CUTTING-EDGE, REFINED, STUNNING -- NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, EXCEPTIONAL! This 2024 Cadillac LYRIQ Luxury 2 (1SD) with ALL-WHEEL DRIVE is a bold expression of Cadillac's electric future. Built on GM's advanced Ultium platform, it delivers instant torque, whisper-quiet acceleration, and an impressively smooth ride. The sculpted exterior, dramatic LED lighting signature, and expansive digital display create a futuristic presence that feels straight out of a concept studio -- yet fully ready for everyday life. It's innovation with intention, perfectly aligned with Cadillac's modern 'Be Iconic' philosophy. For this one, automotive journalists didn't just critique it -- they practically queued up to drive it again. 2024 Car and Driver Editors' Choice -- Electric Luxury SUV IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK (LYRIQ, when properly equipped) Kelley Blue Book Best Luxury Electric SUV finalist recognition MotorTrend praise for design, execution, and technology integration With its odometer hovering around the 20,751-mark & registered on 06/25/2024, it is STILL COVERED under Cadillac's factory warranty programs. Bumper-to-Bumper Limited Warranty -- 4 years or 50,000 miles from 06/25/2024, transferable to subsequent owners, coverage through 06/25/2028 or 50,000 miles, whichever comes first Electric Propulsion Component Limited Warranty -- 8 years or 100,000 miles from 06/25/2024, transferable to subsequent owners, coverage through 06/25/2032 or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first; includes battery and electric drive components with specific capacity retention standards Drivetrain / Roadside Assistance Program -- 6 years or 70,000 miles from 06/25/2024, transferable to subsequent owners, coverage through 06/25/2030 or 70,000 miles, whichever comes first Want to extend its warranty coverage? In most cases, we can provide expanded options to cover each vehicle with a valuable, comprehensive warranty for years to come! The Luxury 2 trim elevates the LYRIQ experience with enhanced driver-assistance technologies, upgraded interior finishes, expanded ambient lighting themes, premium seating appointments, and advanced convenience features that build upon the already impressive Luxury 1 foundation. This LYRIQ feels engineered for a new era of mobility -- immersive digital interfaces, refined craftsmanship, intelligent safety systems, and electrified performance all working in harmony. It's Cadillac daring to redefine what American luxury can be. Propulsion, Electric, ALL-WHEEL DRIVE -- Dual-motor system providing confident traction and approximately 500 horsepower with instant torque delivery Sunroof, Power, Dual Panel, Panoramic, Sliding, With Power Sunshade -- Expansive glass roof that floods the cabin with natural light and opens at the touch of a button Charging Module, 19.2 kW AC -- High-capacity Level 2 charging capability (up to 240V/100A) for significantly faster at-home charging With 20-inch wheels and dual-motor AWD, this LYRIQ delivers an EPA-estimated range of approximately 307 miles on a full charge. Output is approximately 500 horsepower and 450 lb-ft of torque, delivering effortless acceleration. Charging flexibility is excellent: Level 1 (120V household outlet): roughly 3--4 miles of range per hour of charging Standard Level 2 (240V): approximately 25--35 miles of range per hour Upgraded 19.2 kW AC module: up to about 51 miles of range per hour under ideal conditions, allowing a near full charge in approximately 5--6 hours DC Fast Charging: can add roughly 70--80 miles of range in about 10 minutes at compatible public fast chargers Mechanically, the dual-motor electric drivetrain provides immediate torque with seamless power delivery through a single-speed reduction transmission. Without traditional gear shifts, acceleration feels uninterrupted and smooth. Regenerative braking helps recapture energy during deceleration, extending range while reducing brake wear. The Ultium battery architecture contributes to a low center of gravity for confident handling. On the exterior, Cadillac's signature illuminated grille, vertical LED headlamps and taillamps, flush door handles, sculpted body lines, and striking 20-inch wheels give this LYRIQ unmistakable presence. The panoramic dual-panel sunroof enhances both styling and cabin openness, creating a dramatic silhouette day or night. Inside, a sweeping 33-inch curved advanced LED display integrates driver information and infotainment into one elegant interface. Built-in navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, voice recognition, and available Wi-Fi hotspot (subscription required) create a connected driving experience. Over-the-Air update capability helps keep systems current. The cabin surrounds occupants with premium seating materials, heated front seats, multi-zone automatic climate control, customizable ambient lighting, and generous rear legroom thanks to the flat EV floor architecture. Thoughtful storage solutions and refined trim accents elevate the overall environment. Safety is reinforced with Forward Collision Alert, Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Keep Assist with Lane Departure Warning, Blind Zone Steering Assist, Rear Cross Traffic Braking, HD rear vision camera, adaptive cruise control, traction control, and stability management systems. The rigid battery structure enhances overall chassis strength for occupant protection. ...and there's SO MUCH more! The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision. Convenience The cruise control accesses camera, radar and/or GPS satellite data, to automatically determine if it should slow for a curve in the road ahead. This intelligent cruise control system uses laser or radar to maintain a preset following distance behind another vehicle, automatically braking (to a complete stop if needed) or accelerating as required.Safety and Security The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane. An active blind spot system helps prevent the driver from making a lane change when another vehicle is in their blind spot. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision. Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile devices can wirelessly connect to the internet through the vehicle's private mobile network. description: Thank you for choosing Holler Honda, this Crystal Black Pearl 2025 Honda Civic Sedan Sport is a great choice!  Check out the following:  No Accidents!  One Owner!     BLACK, CLOTH/LEATHERETTE SEATING SURFACES    This Civic Sedan has the following features: Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: This Certified Dark Ocean Blue 2025 Kia Seltos EX would be a welcomed addition to your family/business. No Accidents!  One Owner!   Features/Packages:Carpeted Floor Mats ($190 value)Includes front and rear carpet floor mats.Cross Bars ($400 value)  Convenience Cruise control maintains a preset vehicle speed; automatically increasing or decreasing throttle to maintain that speed. Access to the cargo area is gained via a large, power-operated rear door that opens upwards.  This door may also contain the rear windshield of the vehicle.Safety and Security The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle is equipped with a camera that displays an image of the area behind the vehicle on an interior display. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending rear collision. An active lane departure system alerts the driver of unintended movement of the vehicle out of a designated traffic lane and automatically maintains the vehicle's position within that lane. Brake assist senses panic braking from the speed of the brake pedal's travel and applies all available power brake boost.Technology and Telematics Without the need for a manufacturer specific app to be installed on the smart device, the vehicle infotainment system can access and control functions of a smart device physically plugged-into the vehicle. The vehicle is equipped with a built-in voice activated navigation system. Motivated by a Twin-TurboCharged 3.0 Liter Hurricane 6 Cylinder delivering 420hp to an 8 Speed Automatic transmission engineered for off-road domination. Our fierce and stylish RAM features LED lighting, fog lamps, a sport performance hood, bold graphics, lower two-tone paint, alloy wheels, off-road fender flares, and robust skid plates. A drop-in bedliner has also been installed.  Our Rebel cabin is ready for rough terrain thanks to its heated cloth front seats, eight-way power for the driver, a heated-wrapped steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, 12V/115V outlets, a power rear window, and remote start. For safety's sake, RAM supplies front/rear auto braking, blind-spot monitoring, adaptive cruise control, active lane management, trailer sway damping, hill-start assistance, and more. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: CADILLAC CERTIFIED. Experience the perfect combination of power, luxury, and innovation in this 2024 Cadillac Escalade Sport, available now at Ryan Cadillac in Buffalo, Minnesota. This one-owner, all-wheel-drive SUV with a clean vehicle history exemplifies modern sophistication and capability, offering a commanding presence on the road and an unmatched level of refinement for drivers across Buffalo and the greater Twin Cities area. The 2024 Escalade Sport is powered by a 6.2-liter V8 engine paired with a smooth 10-speed automatic transmission, delivering robust performance and impressive towing capability. Cadillacs advanced all-wheel-drive system, Magnetic Ride Control suspension, and limited-slip differential provide a confident and composed ride in all conditionsfrom Minnesotas icy winters to summer weekend getaways. The exterior showcases 22-inch 12-spoke Dark Android aluminum wheels, deep-tinted glass, and signature LED headlamps that define the Escalades bold, unmistakable design. Inside, the cabin surrounds passengers with exceptional comfort and cutting-edge technology. Premium leather upholstery, heated and ventilated front seats, heated second-row captains chairs, and power-folding third-row seats create a luxurious, versatile space for up to seven passengers. The heated steering wheel, power tilt-and-telescoping steering column, and memory settings add personalized comfort, while the panoramic sunroof enhances the interiors airy, open feel. The 16.9-inch curved OLED touchscreen display, built-in navigation, and premium AKG Studio sound system deliver an immersive experience. Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity, wireless device charging, 4G LTE Wi-Fi, and multiple power outletsincluding a 120-volt household plugkeep you seamlessly connected wherever the road leads. Safety and driver assistance features in this Escalade Sport are truly state-of-the-art. Cadillacs suite of advanced technologies includes Adaptive Cruise Control, Forward Collision Alert, Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Keep Assist with Lane Departure Warning, and Pedestrian Braking. Additional systems such as Surround Vision, a Rear Camera Digital Mirror, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, Side Blind Zone Monitoring, and Front and Rear Park Assist with Automatic Braking provide full situational awareness. The Head-Up Display and Automatic Parking Assist with braking further elevate the driving experience, offering precision and confidence in every maneuver. This Escalade also delivers exceptional versatility for towing and hauling with a 3.23 rear axle ratio, integrated trailer brake controller, and Hitch Guidance system, allowing it to tow confidently while maintaining Cadillacs signature ride comfort. At Ryan Cadillac in Buffalo, every pre-owned vehicle undergoes meticulous reconditioning to meet our highest standards. For this 2024 Escalade Sport, we completed a comprehensive multi-point inspection with oil change, performed a full exterior and interior detail, and verified that all systems meet Cadillacs strict performance and safety expectations. Combining commanding performance, cutting-edge technology, and timeless luxury, this 2024 Cadillac Escalade Sport is an exceptional choice for discerning drivers in Buffalo, MN. Contact us for availability and a test drive today. Buy with confidence at Ryan Auto Mall. With over 22,500 reviews, 9 GM Mark of Excellence awards, and 65 MN DealerRater Dealer of the Year honors, our reputation is proven. This pre-owned vehicle includes warranty coverage for added peace of mind. Pricing excludes tax, title, license, and a $350 doc fee. Every vehicle is pre-fitted with PULSE, our rear-end collision deterrent system, available for just $399. Luxury Carpeted Floor Mats  SX Prestige Seat Package  Navigation System  Power 2nd-Row Moonroof  Power Liftgate  Heated front seats  Heated/Ventilated 2nd Row Power VIP Lounge Seats  Wheels: 7.5J x 19" Black Painted Alloy  Powered by a robust V6 engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, the Carnival SX Prestige delivers a thrilling and efficient driving experience. With an impressive 19 MPG in the city and 26 MPG on the highway, this minivan offers the perfect balance of performance and fuel economy.  Step inside and be captivated by the Carnival's luxurious interior, featuring premium leather seating, heated and ventilated front seats, and a stunning power moonroof that floods the cabin with natural light. The advanced infotainment system, complete with navigation and seamless smartphone integration, keeps you connected and entertained on every journey.  Families will appreciate the Carnival's exceptional versatility, with a split-folding third-row seat and ample cargo space for all your adventures. The power liftgate and available power-sliding doors make loading and unloading a breeze, while the advanced safety features, including a rear-view camera and a suite of driver-assist technologies, provide the peace of mind you deserve.  This one-owner Carnival SX Prestige is a true gem, offering the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality. description: Discover the perfect balance of style, performance, and technology in the 2025 Nissan Altima 2.5 SV. This exceptional sedan is ready to elevate your driving experience and exceed your expectations. Powered by a 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine and CVT with Xtronic, this Altima delivers an exceptional blend of efficiency and responsiveness, with an impressive 27 city/39 highway MPG. description: This 2025 Hyundai Tucson Limited, has a Phantom Black exterior and an Black interior color. 6,057 miles.  Stock Number RAFZ3209. You can connect with us by calling 315-509-9386.   No Accidents!  One Owner!       Option Group 01        Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control. Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring    OPTION GROUP 01, PHANTOM BLACK, BLACK, LEATHER-TRIMMED SEAT TRIM, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO NET, CROSS RAILS, FIRST AID KIT  Come on in to Bob Johnson Ford Pulaski today at 84 Caprara Drive Pulaski NY 13142 or call 315-509-9386 to schedule a test drive![!@@Additional Info@@!]Engine: 2.5L GDI MPI DOHC CVVT 4-Cylinder -inc: idle stop and go|Transmission: 8-Speed Automatic w/SHIFTRONIC -inc: drive mode select (normal, sport, my drive), column-mounted shift-by-wire gear selector and paddle shifters|Transmission w/Driver Selectable Mode|Electronic Transfer Case|Automatic Full-Time All-Wheel|3.65 Axle Ratio|Battery w/Run Down Protection|150 Amp Alternator|Towing Equipment -inc: Trailer Sway Control|4861# Gvwr|Gas-Pressurized Shock Absorbers|Front And Rear Anti-Roll Bars|Electric Power-Assist Steering|14.3 Gal. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. With its spacious and comfortable interior, advanced technology features, and impressive fuel efficiency, this Sorento is the perfect choice for families, commuters, and adventurers alike.  Under the hood, the 2.5L I4 DGI DOHC 16V engine delivers a robust 191 horsepower, mated to a smooth-shifting 8-speed automatic transmission. With an EPA-estimated 23 mpg in the city and 31 mpg on the highway, this Sorento will keep you moving without breaking the bank at the pump.  The exterior of this Sorento features a sleek and modern design, highlighted by the Glacial White Pearl paint and 18-inch Gloss Black alloy wheels. The available advanced driver-assistance technologies, including the Exterior Parking Camera Rear and Auto High-beam Headlights, provide added peace of mind and confidence on the road. One Owner! No Accidents!   WHY THIS VEHICLE?  Safety and Security An active blind spot system helps prevent the driver from making a lane change when another vehicle is in their blind spot. The vehicle is equipped with a system that senses, and then prepares, the vehicle and/or occupants, for an impending forward collision. The vehicle constantly monitors the roadway in front of the vehicle and identifies and tracks pedestrians on an interior display. If the system determines a likely impact, it will automatically take preventative steps to avoid hitting the pedestrian. With this system the driver's hands must remain on the wheel at all times but can be removed briefly (for a few seconds), otherwise the vehicle will prompt the driver to put their hands back on the wheel.Technology and Telematics Wireless App-Connect (w/Apple CarPlay, Android Auto & MirrorLink) smart device wireless mirroring     Fair Market Pricing We use advanced technology, real-time market data, and third-party tools like KBB, Edmunds and Carfax to ensure our prices are competitive. description: This 2025 Ford Expedition Active 4x4 represents the next generation of full-size SUV capability, interior technology, and family versatility. With only 17,092 miles and Gold Certified status, this low-mileage Expedition delivers modern EcoBoost performance, intelligent four-wheel drive, and seating for up to eight passengers in a highly desirable configuration.  Powered by the 3.5L EcoBoost V6 paired with the 10-speed automatic transmission with SelectShift capability, this Expedition provides strong torque for towing and confident highway merging while maintaining refined ride quality. The Intelligent 4WD system, Terrain Management System with selectable drive modes, Hill Start Assist, Hill Descent Control, and two-speed transfer case ensure composed performance whether on pavement or light off-road terrain. Heavy-Duty Trailer Tow capability and Trailer Sway Control reinforce its full-size SUV credentials.  Finished in Oxford White over Dark Gray cloth captains chairs, this Expedition Active carries a clean, modern presence. LED reflector headlamps, LED tail lamps, fixed running boards, black roof rack side rails, rear privacy glass, and the distinctive Ford Split Gate rear liftgate system add both style and functionality.  Inside, the cabin reflects the newest Expedition design language. A large 24-inch panoramic display integrating a 13.2-inch center touchscreen creates a modern, driver-focused cockpit. SYNC 4 connectivity, SiriusXM with 360L capability, tri-zone automatic climate control, power-fold third-row seating, second-row 40/20/40 fold-flat bench, cargo management system, and rotary gear shift dial make this SUV exceptionally family-friendly. Intelligent access with push-button start adds everyday convenience.  Safety and driver assistance are extensive. Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0 includes advanced driver support technologies designed to enhance confidence behind the wheel. AdvanceTrac with Roll Stability Control, Safety Canopy side curtain airbags, rear occupant alert, rearview camera, and a comprehensive airbag system provide layered protection.  As a Gold Certified Ford, this Expedition has passed a rigorous 172-point inspection and includes manufacturer-backed limited warranty coverage, 24/7 roadside assistance, and additional certified benefits that provide substantial peace of mind beyond a standard used vehicle purchase.  Through the Parks Plus program, this vehicle also includes added ownership protections such as exterior and interior surface protection, VIN etching anti-theft security, roadside assistance enhancements, ID theft protection and restoration services, and additional long-term ownership benefits designed to help protect your investment.  If you are searching in the Tampa Bay area for a low-mileage, next-generation Expedition 4x4 with modern interior technology and full-size capability, this Gold Certified Active model stands out from older-generation SUVs on the market. Lightly driven examples with this equipment and seating configuration do not remain available long. Whether your local or traveling in from nearby communities, we make it easy to find a vehicle worth the drive.  This 2025 GMC Yukon AT4 is a true standout in the full-size SUV segment, offering a captivating blend of power, capability, and refined style. Equipped with a robust EcoTec3 6.2L V8 engine and a 10-speed automatic transmission, this Yukon AT4 delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, with 420 horsepower and 460 lb-ft of torque. The 4-wheel-drive system, combined with the advanced Magnetic Ride Control suspension, ensures a smooth and confident ride, whether navigating city streets or venturing off the beaten path.  - AT4 PREMIUM PACKAGE - Panoramic power sunroof - Power-retractable assist steps with perimeter lighting - Technology Package - Bose 10-speaker surround sound system - Hands-free power liftgate - Dual-pane panoramic power sunroof - Power-retractable assist steps - Magnetic Ride Control suspension - Heated and ventilated front seats - Heated rear seats  The exterior of this Yukon AT4 exudes a commanding presence, with its bold Midnight Pine color and rugged, off-road-inspired design cues. The 20-inch machined and painted alloy wheels, combined with the black roof-mounted luggage rack side rails and red horizontal-mounted recovery hooks, add to the vehicle's adventurous spirit. Step inside, and you'll be greeted by a spacious and premium cabin, featuring perforated leather seating surfaces, heated and ventilated front seats, and a 15-inch diagonal multi-color head-up display.  The advanced technology features in this Yukon AT4 are truly impressive. The 16.8-inch diagonal premium GMC Infotainment System, with built-in navigation and SiriusXM with 360L, keeps you connected and entertained on the go. The comprehensive safety suite, including forward collision alert, lane keep assist, and adaptive cruise control, provides added peace of mind for you and your passengers.  Whether you're looking to conquer the great outdoors or simply enjoy the ultimate in luxury and convenience, this 2025 GMC Yukon AT4 is the perfect choice. With its uncompromising capabilities, premium amenities, and striking appearance, this SUV is sure to turn heads and exceed your expectations. We invite you to experience the Yukon AT4 for yourself by scheduling a test drive at our dealership today. description: This 2025 Ford Expedition Platinum 4x4 represents the flagship of the Expedition lineup, combining full-size SUV capability with premium materials, advanced technology, and refined EcoBoost performance. With only 13,494 miles and Gold Certified status, this is a low-mileage, top-tier configuration positioned well above lower trim levels.  Powered by the 3.5L EcoBoost V6 paired with the 10-speed automatic transmission, this Expedition delivers strong torque for towing and confident highway acceleration while maintaining smooth ride quality. Intelligent 4WD, Terrain Management System with selectable drive modes, Hill Descent Control, and Heavy-Duty Trailer Tow capability reinforce its versatility for both family travel and weekend adventure.  Finished in Space Silver Metallic over Salt Crystal Gray leather-trimmed seating, this Platinum stands apart with signature grille lighting, 22-inch Ebony Bright Machined aluminum wheels, panoramic Vista Roof, rain-sensing wipers, 360-degree zone lighting, Ford Split Gate tailgate, and distinctive Platinum exterior detailing.  Inside, the cabin reflects the newest generation Expedition design. A 24-inch panoramic instrument panel display paired with a 13.2-inch center touchscreen creates a modern, technology-forward cockpit. Heated and ventilated front seats, heated second-row seats, power-fold third-row 40/20/40 seating, memory driver seat, ambient lighting, power-adjustable pedals with memory, tri-zone automatic climate control, and flexible powered console elevate both comfort and functionality.  Technology is comprehensive. Ford Co-Pilot360 Active 2.0, Intersection Assist, Driver State Detection, BlueCruise capability (90-day trial), wireless charging pad, SiriusXM with 360L capability, universal garage door opener, and advanced connectivity features make this Platinum a fully modern luxury SUV.  Safety remains a priority with AdvanceTrac with Roll Stability Control, Safety Canopy side curtain airbags, rear occupant alert, perimeter alarm, and a full suite of driver assistance systems designed to enhance confidence behind the wheel.  As a Gold Certified Ford, this Expedition has passed a rigorous 172-point inspection and includes manufacturer-backed limited warranty coverage, 24/7 roadside assistance, and additional certified benefits that provide meaningful peace of mind beyond a traditional pre-owned purchase.  Through the Parks Plus program, this vehicle also includes added ownership protections such as exterior and interior surface protection, VIN etching anti-theft security, roadside assistance enhancements, ID theft protection and restoration services, and additional long-term ownership benefits designed to help protect your investment.  If you are searching in the Tampa Bay area for a nearly new, fully equipped Platinum Expedition with modern design, premium materials, and advanced driver assistance technology, this low-mileage Gold Certified example stands at the top of the segment. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. When you choose Wood Nissan of Tiffany Springs, you're not just buying a caryou're gaining a dealership for life.  - SL PREMIUM PACKAGE - Floor Mats w/2-Piece Cargo Area Protector - Roof Rail Cross Bars - Splash Guards (Set of 4 - Black) - Navigation system: NissanConnect with Navigation and Services - Tri-Zone Automatic Temperature Control - Head-Up Display - Motion-Activated Power Liftgate - Panoramic Moonroof - Reverse Tilt-Down Outside Mirrors - Memory Driver Seat and Outside Mirrors - Rear Door Sunshades - Rear Personal Lights  This 2025 Nissan Rogue SL is a true standout in the compact SUV segment, delivering a winning combination of style, technology, and capability. With its sleek black exterior and premium SL trim, this Rogue commands attention wherever it goes. But it's not just about good looksthis SUV is packed with an impressive array of features that cater to your every need.  Under the hood, you'll find a 1.5L DOHC engine paired with Nissan's renowned Xtronic CVT transmission and Intelligent All-Wheel Drive. This powertrain delivers a smooth, responsive driving experience while also achieving an impressive 28 city/34 highway MPG. Whether you're navigating city streets or tackling winding country roads, the Rogue SL will get you there with confidence and efficiency.  But the real star of the show is the cabin, which has been meticulously designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. The SL Premium Package elevates the experience with features like a panoramic moonroof, tri-zone automatic climate control, and a head-up display that puts vital information right in your line of sight. The memory-equipped driver's seat and mirrors ensure you can always find your perfect driving position, while the rear door sunshades and personal reading lights add an extra touch of luxury.  Connectivity is also a top priority, with the NissanConnect infotainment system providing seamless integration of your smartphone via Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. And with the available navigation system, you'll never have to worry about getting lost, even in unfamiliar territory.  Safety is equally important, and the Rogue SL delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. From automatic emergency braking to lane departure warning and more, you can drive with confidence knowing that your Rogue is looking out for you.  If you're in the market for a compact SUV that offers the perfect blend of style, technology, and capability, the 2025 Nissan Rogue SL is a must-see. The vinyl and cloth front sport contour bucket seats provide support, making your everyday commutes and long journeys supremely comfortable.  Technology is at your fingertips with SYNC 4, featuring enhanced voice recognition. Seamlessly connect to your digital life with FordPass Connect 4G, offering internet access to keep you in the loop wherever your adventures take you. Enjoy your favorite tunes through the six-speaker system, while the connected navigation guides you effortlessly to your destinations.  Safety is paramount, and the Escape Hybrid employs Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist+ to give you peace of mind. The adaptive cruise control with Stop-and-Go simplifies highway driving, while the rear-view camera and rear parking sensors enhance your parking precision. Emergency communication through SYNC 4 911 Assist ensures help is always within reach.  Whether its a city escapade or a countryside getaway, this Escape adapts to your life with ease. The split-folding rear seats make room for gear, groceries, or weekend travel bags, while the remote starter system and keyless entry add convenience to your everyday routine.
